svg.title: PPG — animated tour of tutorials 01→06
svg.desc: A 90-second looping SVG that plays through the six tutorials of the Platform Planning Gateway proof of concept. It shows the amplified agentic loop end to end: intent enrichment against the ADR store, deterministic plan linting, capability tickets, in-tool guards, skill governance and ADR authoring — culminating in the tutorial 6 climax where a governed skill drives a real Claude Code session through every gate.

g.text: Platform Planning Gateway — the amplified agentic loop
Act 1 · Tutorial 01 — the manual cycle (curl loop)
Act 2 · Tutorial 02 — Claude Code end to end
Act 3 · Tutorial 03 — GitHub Copilot preflight (soft half only)
Act 4 · Tutorial 04 — the skill governance gate
Act 5 · Tutorial 05 — write your first ADR
Act 6 · Tutorial 06 — a governed skill drives a governed session
governance injected inside each step of the loop — planning, execution, observation
or any LLM in a loop
The four gates a governed session crosses
semantic feedback: not "no", but "here is what is missing"
Phase 1 — every message goes through the gateway
"Add the Seka payment method to checkout"
Phase 2 — MCP + PreToolUse: the gateway inside a live Claude Code session
black-box agent · compensating control at apply time
Phase 3 — for agents that cannot call the gateway in-loop, only the soft half applies
✗ description: must start with third-person verb
tier derived from tools mentioned in body
Phase 4 — Gate 1 of the skills registry: publication is a lint-and-tier decision
gateway restart · ADR store loaded: 5 invariants · Plan linter ready: 5 policies
"still useful if the model is twice as intelligent?"
Phase 5 — every rule is written twice: prose for the agent, Rego for the linter
The team writes the skill and its policy.
The platform owns the gates. The agent executes — and every step passes through them.
Phase 6 — climax: one skill, one prompt, all four gates fire in order
